lines.text: VibeCat. Your Proactive Desktop Companion.
Hey! Good to see you. How about we set the vibe with some relaxing background music while you work?
Yes, play it.
Using vision-based control. Look, decide, move, click, verify.
Meow! Music is playing! Enjoy your coding session.
Music continues in the background throughout the entire demo.
Act two. Proactive Code Enhancement.
VibeCat reads your code in Antigravity IDE.
Clicking Gemini Chat and typing: Enhance the comments for this code.
Done! I've typed 'Enhance the comments for this code' into Antigravity.
Nya! You're working on getUserData. Don't forget to add logic to save the data to sessionCache afterwards!
Gemini AI analyzes and improves code documentation.
Gemini completes enhancement with detailed documentation.
Act three. Terminal Automation.
VibeCat switches to Terminal and reads the screen.
Typing go vet, verifying the result. Lint check passed.
Running go vet! Checking for lint issues for you.
Architecture overview. Swift client connects to Cloud Run gateway, powered by Gemini Live API.
Running live on Google Cloud Platform. Cloud Run, Firestore, and Cloud Logging.
VibeCat by Two Weeks Team. Observe, suggest, wait, act, verify. Built for the Gemini Live Agent Challenge 2026.
